about_text.value: A Shakespearean tragedy adaptation where ambition, prophecy, and moral decay intertwine in the Scottish highlands. Navigate treachery, occult forces, and the consequences of unchecked ambition.

storyworld_title: Thane of Cawdor: A Macbeth Storyworld

characters.name: Elizabeth Bennet
characters.description: A sharp social reasoner calibrating trust under sparse evidence.

characters.name: Fitzwilliam Darcy
characters.description: A high-status signaler with low transparency and delayed vulnerability.

characters.name: Jane Bennet
characters.description: A benevolent prior modeler vulnerable to strategic silence.

characters.name: Charles Bingley
characters.description: A high-variance actor swayed by local consensus fields.

characters.name: George Wickham
characters.description: A deceptive signal jammer exploiting reputation lag.

characters.name: Lady Catherine
characters.description: An institutional prior enforcer optimizing class boundary conditions.

prompt_script.value: In the 1th iteration, humanity is no longer a species so much as a design constraint. Their bodies, values, and tempo drift. A new baseline is declared, and everything older becomes a myth with sharp edges.

text_script.value: Advance the doctrine.
